targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS total FROM system.query_log WHERE type = 'QueryFinish' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) AND query NOT LIKE '%system.%'
SELECT count() AS failed FROM system.query_log WHERE type = 'ExceptionWhileProcessing' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) AND query NOT LIKE '%system.%'
SELECT round(avg(query_duration_ms)) AS avg_ms FROM system.query_log WHERE type = 'QueryFinish' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) AND query NOT LIKE '%system.%'
SELECT count() AS running FROM system.processes

panels.title: Query Volume over Time (successful vs failed)

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(event_time) AS time, countIf(type = 'QueryFinish') AS successful, countIf(type = 'ExceptionWhileProcessing') AS failed FROM system.query_log WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND query NOT LIKE '%system.%' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfMinute(event_time) AS time, round(quantile(0.5)(query_duration_ms)) AS p50_ms, round(quantile(0.95)(query_duration_ms)) AS p95_ms, round(quantile(0.99)(query_duration_ms)) AS p99_ms FROM system.query_log WHERE type = 'QueryFinish' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) AND query NOT LIKE '%system.%' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Top 10 Slowest Query Shapes (by avg duration)

targets.rawSql: SELECT any(query) AS sample_query, user, count() AS executions, round(avg(query_duration_ms)) AS avg_ms, max(query_duration_ms) AS max_ms, round(quantile(0.95)(query_duration_ms)) AS p95_ms, formatReadableSize(max(memory_usage)) AS peak_mem FROM system.query_log WHERE type = 'QueryFinish' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) AND query NOT LIKE '%system.%' GROUP BY normalized_query_hash, user ORDER BY avg_ms DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT any(query) AS sample_query, user, count() AS executions, formatReadableSize(sum(memory_usage)) AS total_mem, formatReadableSize(max(memory_usage)) AS peak_mem, round(avg(query_duration_ms)) AS avg_ms FROM system.query_log WHERE type = 'QueryFinish' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) AND query NOT LIKE '%system.%' GROUP BY normalized_query_hash, user ORDER BY sum(memory_usage) DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top 10 High Read-Volume Query Shapes (data scanned)

targets.rawSql: SELECT any(query) AS sample_query, user, count() AS executions, formatReadableSize(sum(read_bytes)) AS total_read_bytes, sum(read_rows) AS total_read_rows, round(avg(query_duration_ms)) AS avg_ms FROM system.query_log WHERE type = 'QueryFinish' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) AND query NOT LIKE '%system.%' GROUP BY normalized_query_hash, user ORDER BY sum(read_bytes) DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT event_time, user, query, exception FROM system.query_log WHERE type = 'ExceptionWhileProcessing' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) AND query NOT LIKE '%system.%' ORDER BY event_time DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT user, count() AS queries, round(avg(query_duration_ms)) AS avg_ms, formatReadableSize(sum(memory_usage)) AS total_mem FROM system.query_log WHERE type = 'QueryFinish' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) AND query NOT LIKE '%system.%' GROUP BY user ORDER BY queries DESC
SELECT user, round(elapsed * 1000) AS elapsed_ms, formatReadableSize(memory_usage) AS memory, query FROM system.processes ORDER BY elapsed DESC

SELECT exception_code, any(exception) AS message, count() AS occurrences FROM system.query_log WHERE type = 'ExceptionWhileProcessing' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) AND query NOT LIKE '%system.%' GROUP BY exception_code ORDER BY occurrences DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT any(query) AS sample_query, user, count() AS hits, formatReadableSize(max(memory_usage)) AS max_mem, round(avg(query_duration_ms)) AS avg_ms FROM system.query_log WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND memory_usage > 500000000 AND query NOT LIKE '%system.%' GROUP BY normalized_query_hash, user ORDER BY max(memory_usage) DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT event_time AS time, CurrentMetric_MemoryTracking AS memory_bytes FROM system.metric_log WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Concurrent Queries in Flight over Time

targets.rawSql: SELECT event_time AS time, CurrentMetric_Query AS concurrent_queries FROM system.metric_log WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) ORDER BY time

SELECT table, formatReadableSize(sum(bytes_on_disk)) AS disk_size, formatReadableSize(sum(data_uncompressed_bytes)) AS uncompressed, round(sum(bytes_on_disk) * 100.0 / sum(data_uncompressed_bytes), 1) AS compression_pct, formatReadableQuantity(sum(rows)) AS total_rows, count() AS parts FROM system.parts WHERE database = 'cce_analytics' AND active GROUP BY table ORDER BY sum(bytes_on_disk) DESC

SELECT table, count() AS active_parts, sum(rows) AS total_rows, formatReadableSize(sum(bytes_on_disk)) AS disk_size, max(modification_time) AS last_merge FROM system.parts WHERE database = 'cce_analytics' AND active GROUP BY table ORDER BY active_parts DESC

SELECT database, table, consumer_id, length(assignments.topic) AS partitions, num_messages_read, last_poll_time, length(exceptions.text) AS exceptions, if(length(exceptions.text) > 0, exceptions.text[1], '') AS last_exception FROM system.kafka_consumers ORDER BY num_messages_read DESC

SELECT any(query) AS sample_query, user, count() AS executions, round(avg(query_duration_ms)) AS avg_ms, formatReadableSize(sum(memory_usage)) AS total_mem FROM system.query_log WHERE type = 'QueryFinish' AND $__timeFilter(event_time) AND query NOT LIKE '%system.%' GROUP BY normalized_query_hash, user HAVING count() > 5 ORDER BY executions DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT table, round(elapsed) AS elapsed_s, formatReadableSize(bytes_read_uncompressed) AS read, formatReadableSize(bytes_written_uncompressed) AS written, round(progress * 100, 1) AS progress_pct FROM system.merges WHERE database = 'cce_analytics' ORDER BY elapsed DESC
